app.title: Beyond Bounds
app.subtitle: Step outside your comfort zone, explore the unknown

sidebar.title: Deviation Index
sidebar.description: Set how much you want to break out of your comfort zone. The higher the index, the more different the recommendations will be from your current preferences.

input.title: Your Recent Comfort Zone
input.desc:
Please provide at least 3 same type of things you frequently interact with recently, and we will analyze your style preferences.
e.g. food you eat, music you listen to, movies you watch, YouTube or Twitch channels you follow. The more, the merrier!
input.placeholder: Enter an item name and press Enter...

analyzing.title: Exploring Unknown Boundaries...
analyzing.status: Algorithm is deconstructing your comfort zone

styles.title: Recommended Unknown Territories
styles.desc: Based on your usual preference for '{category}', and a deviation index of {index}%, we've selected these styles for you:

details.title: Specific Exploration Targets
details.desc: Here are specific subjects or targets you can try in the '{style}' style:
